task: Find the weight of baggage allowance for economy class on Qatar Airways.

The "Baggage allowance" link under the "Experience" > "Before you fly" section will lead to the official page containing detailed baggage policies including weight allowances for different cabin classes including economy. This is the most direct and authoritative source for the specific information requested.

The current webpage contains comprehensive baggage allowance information for economy class, including specific weight limits for different fare types and destinations. This information fully addresses the user's request for economy class baggage weight allowance.

- This is a Title element - __id__ 2975-3000: Tab navigation for different classes - __id__ 3015-3042: Table headers and data for Economy class baggage - __id__ 3048: Note about Brazil flights No relevant media elements (images) found in the -20 to +20 range of the content elements that would enhance understanding of the baggage weights. 1 2973 3015, 3017, 3019, 3021, 3024, 3026, 3028, 3030, 3032, 3034, 3036, 3038, 3040, 3042, 3048

Economy Class Baggage Weight Allowance

Qatar Airways offers different baggage allowances based on your economy fare type:

Carry-on Baggage (All Economy Fares)

  • Standard allowance: 1 piece up to 7kg (15lb)
  • Brazil routes exception: 1 piece up to 10kg (22lb) for flights to or from Brazil

Checked Baggage - Flights to/from Africa or the Americas

  • Economy Lite: 1 piece up to 23kg (50lb)
  • Economy Classic: 2 pieces up to 23kg (50lb) each
  • Economy Convenience: 2 pieces up to 23kg (50lb) each
  • Economy Comfort: 2 pieces up to 23kg (50lb) each

Checked Baggage - All Other Destinations

  • Economy Lite: 20kg (44lb) total weight
  • Economy Classic: 25kg (55lb) total weight
  • Economy Convenience: 30kg (66lb) total weight
  • Economy Comfort: 35kg (77lb) total weight

Important Note: For routes to/from Africa or the Americas, the allowance is based on number of pieces with maximum weight per piece. For all other routes, the allowance is based on total weight with no limit on number of pieces (as long as within the weight allowance).

 Completed

final_result_response:
I've successfully found the complete baggage weight allowance information for economy class on Qatar Airways. The allowances vary based on your fare type (Lite, Classic, Convenience, or Comfort) and your destination:

**Carry-on Baggage:**
- Standard: 7kg (15lb)
- Brazil routes: 10kg (22lb)

**Checked Baggage for Africa/Americas:**
- Economy Lite: 1 piece × 23kg
- Economy Classic/Convenience/Comfort: 2 pieces × 23kg each

**Checked Baggage for Other Destinations:**
- Economy Lite: 20kg total
- Economy Classic: 25kg total
- Economy Convenience: 30kg total
- Economy Comfort: 35kg total

The key difference is that Africa/Americas routes use a piece-based system (maximum weight per piece), while other destinations use a total weight allowance system (no limit on number of pieces as long as within the weight limit).
